ddls:
CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the race */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the race track where the race is held */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the specific race */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade classification of the race (I, II, III) */,
  "purse" TEXT /* Total purse for the race */,
  "age_sex" TEXT /* Age and sex restrictions for participants */,
  "distance" TEXT /* Distance of the race */,
  "weather_condition" TEXT /* Weather condition on the race day */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators attending the race */,
  "race_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the race */,
  "race_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the race */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_races_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race track */,
  "track_name" TEXT /* Name of the race track */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the race track */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of spectators */,
  "surface_type" TEXT /* Type of surface of the track */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the track in miles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "horse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each horse */,
  "horse_name" TEXT /* Name of the horse */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the horse */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the horse (Male, Female) */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Owner of the horse */,
  "trainer" TEXT /* Trainer of the horse */,
  "jockey" TEXT /* Jockey riding the horse */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight carried by the horse in the race */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("horse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bets" (
  "bet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bet */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the race for which the bet is placed */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of money placed as a bet */,
  "bet_type" TEXT /* Type of bet (e.g., win, place, show) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user placing the bet */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the bet was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the bet (e.g., pending, won, lost) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bets_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., bettor, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race result */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the race result corresponds to */,
  "horse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the horse that finished */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the horse in the race */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time taken to complete the race */,
  "odds" REAL /* Odds of the horse winning */,
  "margin" TEXT /* Margin by which the horse won or lost */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_horse_id FOREIGN KEY ("horse_id") REFERENCES participants ("horse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purses" (
  "purse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purse entry */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the race the purse relates to */,
  "total_purse" TEXT /* Total purse amount for the race */,
  "first_place" TEXT /* Payout for first place */,
  "second_place" TEXT /* Payout for second place */,
  "third_place" TEXT /* Payout for third place */,
  "sponsor" TEXT /* Sponsor of the purse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purses_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id")
)
column_names: Reference to the race track where the race is held
